lessons.key: surviving_mutant::union guard missing suite path has no discriminating test no test injects a suite into suite table but not into results add a mock drop test asserting exit 1 union guard fail
lessons.text: UNION GUARD missing-suite path has no discriminating test. No test injects a suite into SUITE_TABLE but not into results. Add a mock-drop test asserting exit 1 + UNION GUARD FAIL.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::hook binary tests assert exit 0 only never post body endpoint count removing second pre compact post survived add capture server test verifying 2 posts to correct endpoints body shapes
lessons.text: Hook binary tests assert exit 0 only, never POST body/endpoint/count. Removing second pre-compact POST survived. Add capture-server test verifying 2 POSTs to correct endpoints + body shapes.

lessons.key: ac_gap::m25 name tail resolution has 0 behavior tests test only checks method exists add tests mocking listworkspaces asserting unique ambiguous not found paths
lessons.text: M25 name-tail resolution has 0 behavior tests. Test only checks method exists. Add tests mocking listWorkspaces asserting unique/ambiguous/not-found paths.

lessons.key: gate_fail::n20 crash test assumes architecture map fails with database url empty but it passes via sqlite fallback test gets exit 0 expects non zero rewrite to use genuinely failing suite or wire unused crashtest variable
lessons.text: N20 crash test assumes architecture-map fails with DATABASE_URL empty but it passes via SQLite fallback. Test gets exit 0, expects non-zero. Rewrite to use genuinely-failing suite or wire unused crashTest variable.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::when a unit test bypasses a version gate threshold via a testing seam setjsonschemasupportedfortesting the threshold logic checkjsonschemasupport minor 5 is uncovered add direct tests of the version parser with mocked version strings 0 5 0 0 4 9 1 0 0 garbage so threshold regressions are caught
lessons.text: When a unit test bypasses a version-gate threshold via a testing seam (_setJsonSchemaSupportedForTesting), the threshold logic (_checkJsonSchemaSupport minor >= 5) is uncovered. Add direct tests of the version parser with mocked version strings (0.5.0, 0.4.9, 1.0.0, garbage) so threshold regressions are caught.
